codeReview.summary: The rerun still does not include the required VAL-PERF-001 deliverables. Repository history after the prior failure contains no benchmark-specific commit, there is still no benchmark corpus/harness package or checked-in runtime report, and the only related implementation remains the original large-MR degradation commit, which itself still clears the run fields the writer would need for degradation-mode summary rendering.

issues.description: The repository still has no benchmark corpus, runnable harness, or checked-in runtime evidence for VAL-PERF-001. Searches across the tree and current history found no `internal/bench` package, no benchmark fixtures, and no report artifact proving the required P90 completion measurement path, so the feature's stated benchmark deliverable remains absent.

The only post-failure code relevant to large-MR handling is still commit `bf7ba981b33b0e68aa5ca570ad05e54ca556c3d2` from `beta-large-mr-degradation`. In degradation mode it calls `UpdateReviewRunStatus` with empty `ErrorCode` and `ErrorDetail`, while `internal/writer/writer.go:594` renders the explicit degraded partial-coverage summary only when `run.ErrorCode == "degradation_mode"` and `run.ErrorDetail` contains the body. Because no separate benchmark-evidence fix shipped, the prior failure remains unresolved and there is still no end-to-end evidence/reporting path for the required benchmark target.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `go-reliability` skill explicitly calls out benchmark harness work and package-specific benchmark verification for large-MR features, but this mission still has no worker session, transcript entry, or handoff for `beta-large-mr-benchmark-evidence`, so there is no evidence that the required benchmark procedure was executed at all.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/chris/workspace/mreviewer/.factory/skills/go-reliability/SKILL.md` says the skill applies to 'large-MR degradation and benchmark harnesses' and requires benchmark/concurrency verification, while `/Users/chris/.factory/missions/e68ebab7-a1ca-41e1-9c85-d3b7d9b36400/features.json` still marks `beta-large-mr-benchmark-evidence` pending with `completedWorkerSessionId: null`, `/Users/chris/.factory/missions/e68ebab7-a1ca-41e1-9c85-d3b7d9b36400/worker-transcripts.jsonl` has no transcript for the feature, and `/Users/chris/.factory/missions/e68ebab7-a1ca-41e1-9c85-d3b7d9b36400/handoffs/` contains no handoff file for it.

summary: Review failed. The repository still lacks the missing VAL-PERF-001 benchmark corpus, harness, and checked-in runtime evidence, and there is still no worker session or commit implementing this fix beyond the original large-MR degradation change. The prior failure therefore remains unresolved.
